Providers may return (T, error); the generated code checks and returns it.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type DB struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewDB() (*DB, error) { return &DB{}, nil }

type Handlers struct {
	DB *DB
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Providers
		webDB, err := web.NewDB()
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
			DB: webDB,
		}

		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
